_commentScope: Scoped to pure-logic modules. The IPC handlers (main.ts) + secrets.ts depend on the live Electron runtime — mocking them just to mutate would be high-noise, low-signal.
_thresholdsRationale: Ratcheted up as the score has climbed. break=97 (set at 97.80 after atlassian + types reach 100% total + slack covered 100% + redactSecrets ya29 quantifier pin + FetchError.name pin, buffer 0.80). 7 files at 100% covered: atlassian, github, gmail, kpi, skills, slack, oauth; atlassian + types at 100% TOTAL. The ratchet is non-decreasing.
